name: Spiced Mule
description: A zesty rum mule made with BACARDÍ Spiced rum, ginger beer, and Angostura bitters. Combine BACARDÍ Spiced rum with ginger beer and a dash of bitters for a zesty take on the rum mule. It's a mule with a bit more kick.
recipe_steps: Fill a mule glass with ice.
Combine BACARDÍ Spiced rum, ginger beer and the bitters into a glass.
Stir and pour into the mule glass.
searchable_text: Spiced Mule main rum BACARDÍ Spiced rum A zesty rum mule made with BACARDÍ Spiced rum, ginger beer, and Angostura bitters. Combine BACARDÍ Spiced rum with ginger beer and a dash of bitters for a zesty take on the rum mule. It's a mule with a bit more kick. ingredients 50 ml BACARDÍ Spiced rum, 100 ml ginger beer, 2 dashes Angostura® bitters, 1 lime slice recipe steps Fill a mule glass with ice. Combine BACARDÍ Spiced rum, ginger beer and the bitters into a glass. Stir and pour into the mule glass. Garnish with a lime slice.
